search_query: best apps for improving study habits
retrieved_result: America's Children: Key National Indicators of Well-Being, 2017 Behavior The well-being of young people can be affected by aspects of their behavior and social environments. The indicators in this section focus on illegal and high-risk behaviors. Substance use behaviors are shown for regular cigarette smoking, alcohol use, and illicit drug use. Other indicators
Decision_Reason: The retrieved result discusses indicators of children's well-being and behavior, not apps or tools to improve study habits.
